title: Free AI Video Generator
subtitle: Turn a text prompt into a short AI-generated video in landscape, portrait, or square format.
features: Automatic video length up to about 18 seconds
processingNote: Video generation runs asynchronously and usually takes several minutes.
limitationNote: Availability may vary when the AI video service is busy.
homePreviewTitle: A calm product shot on a wooden desk
homePreviewText: Describe the shot, subject, and mood. Pick landscape, portrait, or square, then generate a short video.
homePreviewMeta: Text to video · Auto length · AI video
